source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Cormorant-style display moments and Inter-style English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for atmospheric observation notes, compact Japanese labels, numeric canopy metrics, and status-heavy swamp canopy records.
layout: Atmospheric 8px grids, 8px radii, hanging strand dividers, dense note and data panels, low shadows, soft fog-paper surfaces, and subtle Spanish moss texture accents.

prompts.label: Transparent Spanish moss drape motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal with soft matte, despill, and one-pixel edge contraction to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only a Spanish moss drape botanical motif, isolated as one complete hanging subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A graceful drape of Spanish moss (Tillandsia usneoides) hanging in long airy strands, silver grey moss fibers with muted green undertones, soft sage highlights, tiny threadlike branching texture, a few warmer cypress-brown twig attachment points at the top, natural swamp canopy character, atmospheric but still clean and usable as a catalog cutout. The plant should read clearly as Spanish moss, not lichen, kelp, willow leaves, vines, roots, smoke, or fabric.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; vertical hanging silhouette, loose veil-like clusters, top attachment visible, lower strands taper naturally; do not crop the subject. Clean studio lighting that preserves silver-grey and green-brown botanical detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no tree trunk scene, no water body, no second subject, no decorative background, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source using the motif as reference, copied from the shared generated-images directory and resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Spanish Moss light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE source board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Spanish Moss" / "Spanish Moss Drape". Use the visible transparent Spanish moss motif reference from this conversation as the source: a hanging drape of fine silver-grey moss strands with muted green undertones, cypress-brown twig attachment points, swamp canopy atmosphere, and airy veil-like texture.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Spanish Moss, Spanish Moss Drape, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from silver grey moss strands, muted moss green undertones, cypress-brown twig attachment points, swamp canopy neutrals, pale lichen highlights, misty air, draping vertical thread texture, and quiet atmospheric notes. The board must read as Spanish moss in a swamp canopy, not generic green UI, not vines, not kelp, not willow, not smoke, and not fabric.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 樹冠, 湿地, 観測, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, canopy notes dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, observation data table, filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, strand texture swatches.
Style/medium: premium atmospheric notes product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, pale fog-paper surfaces, cypress-brown primary controls, silver-moss neutral surfaces, muted green active states, cool atmospheric focus rings, hanging thread dividers, dense but readable note/data panels, subtle Spanish moss fiber texture.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: silver grey moss, sage-green undertones, cypress brown, bark umber, swamp canopy neutrals, pale lichen highlights, misty blue-grey atmospheric accents, deep canopy shadow.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no single-hue palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Spanish Moss", no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source using the motif and light board as references, copied from the shared generated-images directory and resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Spanish Moss dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Spanish Moss" / "Spanish Moss Drape". It must feel like the same atmospheric notes system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible Spanish moss motif and the visible light-mode board language.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable section labels.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, large readable labels, fewer larger rows, no dense tiny token tables, no microscopic text.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Spanish Moss, Spanish Moss Drape, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the Spanish moss system language: silver-grey moss foreground text, muted moss green active states, cypress-brown primary controls, bark-umber borders, mist blue-grey focus/accent rings, pale lichen highlights, deep canopy and swamp-shadow backgrounds, subtle hanging strand texture, precise 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. It must read as Spanish moss in a swamp canopy, not generic green UI, not vines, not kelp, not willow, not smoke, and not fabric.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 樹冠, 湿地, 観測, 検索, 状態. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, canopy notes dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, observation data table, filters, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, toast, pagination, focus rings.
Token coverage: semantic roles background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, spacing scale, 8px radius family, low shadow scale, strand texture swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep canopy shadow and bark umber, raised cards in cool swamp graphite and moss grey, pale lichen foreground text, cypress-brown and silver-moss controls, muted green success/active states, mist blue-grey focus rings and charts, bark separators, subtle Spanish moss fiber overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: silver grey moss, sage-green undertones, cypress brown, bark umber, swamp canopy neutrals, pale lichen highlights, misty blue-grey atmospheric accents, deep canopy shadow.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Spanish Moss", no illegible microtext.
